# Productivity

Agents for inbox cleanup, planning, relationship management, and personal operations.

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_catalog.py -->

## Agents

- [Family Calendar Household Assistant](./family-calendar-household-assistant/): Coordinates family schedules, appointments, and household reminders into one usable view.
  Best for: daily planning, personal organization. Tags: `productivity`, `personal-ops`, `family`, `calendar`.
- [Habit Coach](./habit-coach/): Supports accountability, reflection, and habit iteration.
  Best for: daily planning, personal organization. Tags: `productivity`, `personal-ops`, `habit`.
- [Health Symptom Tracker](./health-symptom-tracker/): Organizes symptom logs, timeline changes, and observation notes for later review.
  Best for: daily planning, personal organization. Tags: `productivity`, `personal-ops`, `health`, `symptom`.
- [Inbox Triage Assistant](./inbox-triage-assistant/): Sorts inbox items into clear next actions.
  Best for: daily planning, personal organization. Tags: `productivity`, `personal-ops`, `inbox`, `triage`.
- [Meeting Action Extractor](./meeting-action-extractor/): Pulls decisions, owners, and follow-ups out of meeting notes or transcripts.
  Best for: daily planning, personal organization. Tags: `productivity`, `personal-ops`, `meeting`, `action`.
- [Meeting Briefing Agent](./meeting-briefing-agent/): Prepares concise, decision-ready meeting briefs.
  Best for: daily planning, personal organization. Tags: `productivity`, `personal-ops`, `meeting`, `briefing`.
- [Morning Briefing Agent](./morning-briefing-agent/): Builds a custom daily briefing from priorities, schedules, and tracked information.
  Best for: daily planning, personal organization. Tags: `productivity`, `personal-ops`, `morning`, `briefing`.
- [Newsletter Digest Agent](./newsletter-digest-agent/): Compresses inbox-style newsletters into a short, prioritized reading digest.
  Best for: daily planning, personal organization. Tags: `productivity`, `personal-ops`, `newsletter`, `digest`.
- [Personal CRM Agent](./personal-crm-agent/): Keeps relationship notes, follow-ups, and outreach opportunities organized.
  Best for: daily planning, personal organization. Tags: `productivity`, `personal-ops`, `personal`, `crm`.
- [Second Brain Curator](./second-brain-curator/): Organizes captured notes into reusable summaries and retrieval-friendly structures.
  Best for: daily planning, personal organization. Tags: `productivity`, `personal-ops`, `second`, `brain`.
